description: MapAnything (Meta Reality Labs + CMU, arXiv 2509.13414): a single feed-forward transformer that regresses factored metric 3D geometry from raw views with NO correspondences. Backs the portable `map.feed_forward` capability via the sceneapi-io Mapper contract. Wrapper + SDK material is Apache-2.0. Weights are opt-in by license: the DEFAULT is the Apache-2.0 variant `facebook/map-anything-apache`; the better CC-BY-NC-4.0 variant `facebook/map-anything` is NON-COMMERCIAL and is selected only by explicit opt-in (a MappingOptions.extra `weights` key or the `SCENEAPI_MAPANYTHING_WEIGHTS` env var). That non-commercial term is upstream's and binds whoever runs those weights, not added by sceneapi.

providers.description: Feed-forward metric 3D reconstruction. Registers all views in one pass; emits dense per-view pointmaps + confidence and a fused sparse cloud. Optional calibration / pose / depth priors.
